title: Role Assignment & Key Inventory
description: Inventory of VistA security keys with holder cross-reference. Keys defined in File 19.1, holder lookup via ^XUSEC global, verification via ORWU HASKEY RPC. Key assignment and removal use POST/DELETE /users/:duz/keys (ZVE USMG KEYS) when the distro overlay RPC is registered; otherwise the API returns integration-pending.

dataSources.description: VistA user key assignments from File 200 KEYS subfile (200.051) — read-only mirror.
VistA security key definitions from File 19.1. Fast holder lookup: ^XUSEC(keyName,DUZ). RPC: ORWU HASKEY.
